sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70107" key="nekrosto/los" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νεκρο-στόλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n70107.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">layer-out of corpses,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:4:56" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.56</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
